description_long: This is a two-story modern house surrounded by numerous evergreen trees, featuring a flat roof and a light brick exterior. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a wooden deck with a hot tub, and a small outdoor seating area. There is a staircase on one side of the house leading up to a secondary entrance or balcony. The backyard area contains a swing set, a basketball hoop, and a small shed or garage. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large rectangular panes providing ample natural light. The main entryway is accessible via a paved path flanked by trees, and the overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-urban residential setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by evergreen trees, featuring a driveway, hot tub, and outdoor amenities. The exterior is light brick with large windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with cars, hot tub, and outdoor seating area, framed by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, secondary entrance or balcony, and the backyard amenities including a swing set and shed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swing set, basketball hoop, and the back side of the house with more trees.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, both parked cars, hot tub, and the main house facade with large windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, flanked by trees, featuring a simple door and minimal overhang.
